Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}So this is a "shrine"... It's quite similar to a temple, is it not?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}A mysterious presence lurks here... Though it is markedly different from a Shadow.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}...Well then, I shall first observe the local traditions and pay my respects.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 0 25 25}I'd heard that the effects of this mystical "divine grace" were proportional to the amount offered.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 1 25 25}...In any event, I have finished presenting my offering.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}...I have finally finished presenting my offering.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 0 25 25}Though I normally do not reside in this world, I wonder if I, too, may receive "divine grace."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Come to think of it... this system of monetary offerings is very similar to that of the fountain.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}There are a great many locations in your world where supplicants may request good fortune...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}You live in a truly wondrous place.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Could those paper strips tied there be...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Just as I thought... These are "paper fortunes."[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 0 25 25}I've heard of this game. People entrust their destiny to a slip of paper, finding the risk far too exhilarating...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I see... There are many possible destinies written on them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Well then... I'd like to experiment with this for myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 1 25 25}Please wait here while I work on obtaining every single variation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to wait until[n]Elizabeth was satisfied...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Excuse me... I've been curious ever since we arrived, but what is that equipment over there?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}If memory serves, these are... a slide and a jungle gym, correct?[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}I see. In the presence of a true god, upholding a pretense of gravitas is all but meaningless... What a magnanimous and introspective message![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}In order to attain joy, one must first claw one's way to the very top.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 0 25 25}This playground equipment teaches a profound lesson on the true way of the world...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Well, that was certainly entertaining.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 0 25 25}Now, could you please instruct me in the proper use of the jungle gym over here?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 0 25 25}I'm very sorry, but could you please teach me how to use this equipment properly?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}It would be wonderful if you could start with the jungle gym over here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}That was quite entertaining.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 0 25 25}I would very much like for you to continue teaching me how to use the other equipment.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Could I ask that you start with the jungle gym over here?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}Oh dear... It's rather difficult... to maintain one's balance...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Today was even more enjoyable than our other outings thus far.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}To be honest, lately I've been wondering...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}Do I find this world enjoyable simply because of the novelty of the stimuli it presents?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 1 25 25}Perhaps I enjoy myself on these excursions because of your company.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}In any event... I believe I'll have to negotiate with my master to install a horizontal bar in our room.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}I'd like for you to accompany me again sometime, if you wouldn't mind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}Well then, I suppose we should call it a day, but before we do...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 1 25 25}I'd like to go on the slide "1 More" time. Shall we seize the opportunity and go in tandem?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After Elizabeth had her fun, we headed[n]back to the Velvet Room together.[n]{f 1 1}
